name: RF Acquisition Corp II
summary: PART I General RF Acquisition Corp II is a blank check company incorporated on February5, 2024, as a Cayman Islands exempted company. The Company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the Business Combination).
